claim: A caveated DEU production posterior summary may be reported for the full-objective working-lock configuration.
required_qualifier: Internal staged result; not final publication evidence.

claim: A descriptive matched DEU/native comparison of shared sampled parameters may be reported.
required_qualifier: Descriptive posterior comparison only; not model evidence or superiority.

claim: DEU-only shape parameters beta and p_vis may be summarized as DEU-only posterior parameters.
required_qualifier: No native analogue; do not compare as shared parameters.

claim: The native/baseline sampler side is readiness-cleared for descriptive comparison.
required_qualifier: Readiness-cleared chains do not imply evidence or model preference.

claim: The tri-anchor ledger was retained as context throughout the posterior and comparison stages.
required_qualifier: Tri-anchor context is monitoring context, not a separate posterior mode claim.

claim: TT_lite may be discussed as a diagnostic-only monitor.
required_qualifier: TT_lite was not part of the sampled production posterior likelihood.

claim: Parameter row for omega_b may be included in scoped summary tables.
required_qualifier: descriptive posterior comparison only; not model evidence or superiority

claim: Parameter row for n_s may be included in scoped summary tables.
required_qualifier: descriptive posterior comparison only; not model evidence or superiority

claim: Parameter row for A_planck may be included in scoped summary tables.
required_qualifier: descriptive posterior comparison only; not model evidence or superiority

claim: Parameter row for beta may be included in scoped summary tables.
required_qualifier: DEU-only shape parameter; no native analogue

claim: Parameter row for p_vis may be included in scoped summary tables.
required_qualifier: DEU-only shape parameter; no native analogue
